autor: I wouldn’t go back. But wouldn’t I? What about later on? Keeping the thought of her out of that bleak hotbox of a room was going to be like trying to dam a river with a tennis racket.
explicacao: Citação de I wouldn’t go back. But wouldn’t I? What about later on? Keeping the thought of her out of that bleak hotbox of a room was going to be like trying to dam a river with a tennis racket. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The hell with her” articula reflexao, charles-williams, the-hot-spot em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-hot-spot.
